name: dev-loop
description: Generic single-pass PRD + skillwiki dev cycle engine. Execution subagents hard-wired to sonnet for cost efficiency. Includes simplify-worker agent (model: sonnet) for SIMPLIFY code review gate. Pluggable interview phase with native 3-question default and optional grill-with-docs/grill-me upgrade. /setup-dev-loop scaffolds all 5 config sections (PRD, knowledge, release, interview, glossary). Auto-capture, pluggable knowledge backends, drift guard, hot-reload sync, project-agnostic.
